description_long: This is a stylized AK-pattern rifle featuring a vibrant, multicolored finish with dominant teal, blue, and orange hues. The rifle has a fixed stock and a standard-length barrel, both of which are coated in a teal color. The receiver and handguard display a unique, artistic pattern that appears to blend cosmic or abstract motifs. The magazine is a detachable box type, also decorated with the same color scheme as the rest of the rifle. Iron sights are present on the top, and the muzzle is fitted with a standard flash hider. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials, typical for modern rifles.
description: A stylized AK-pattern rifle with a fixed stock, standard barrel, and a vibrant, multicolored finish featuring teal, blue, and orange tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, front sight, and the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, the fixed stock, magazine, and the colorful abstract pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite side of the rifle, including the magazine and the detailed color pattern.
